zh.Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀
zh.Alschbach, Saarland, Deutschland: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀
zh.Lautzkirchen, Saarland, Deutschland: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾勞次吉陳
zh.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL是Johann Hensel的女兒，於大約1649年出生在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀。她於大約1668年與Maximilian Kihm結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1685年6月12日在她的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾勞次吉陳。

zh-hans.Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis: 德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀
zh-hans.Alschbach, Saarland, Deutschland: 德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀
zh-hans.Lautzkirchen, Saarland, Deutschland: 德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾勞次吉陳
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL是Johann Hensel的女儿，于大约1649年出生在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀。她于大约1668年与Maximilian Kihm结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1685年6月12日在她的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾勞次吉陳。

nameMeanings.name: HENSEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Klaus, Manfred, Arno, Dieter, Erwin, Ewald, Fritz, Hans, Helmut, Johannes.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a pet form of the personal name   Hans  .

variants.name: Hans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ananta, Bhim, Chander, Gopal, Madhur, Malkit, Nirmal, Preet, Puneet, Ravi, Rohit, Roop.  German Erwin, Guenther, Helmut, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Kurt, Manfred, Merwin.

German and Dutch: from the personal name Hans, a shortened form of Johannes (see John ). This surname is also found in France (Vosges, Alsace, Lorraine, and Nord). It is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an adoption of the German or Dutch surname.
Indian (Punjab): Arora and Sikh name, from Sanskrit hamsa ‘swan’ or ‘goose’.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL was born about 1649, in Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany as the daughter of Johann Hensel. She married Maximilian Kihm about 1668. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 June 1685, in her hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL est née environ 1649, à Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, fille de Johann Hensel. Elle a épousé Maximilian Kihm environ 1668. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1685, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL wurde um 1649 in Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland, als Tochter von Johann Hensel geboren. Sie hat um 1668 Maximilian Kihm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Juni 1685 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL è nata il circa 1649 nel Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania come figlia di Johann Hensel. Lei sposato Maximilian Kihm circa 1668. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1685, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSELは約1649年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステルアルスチバチでJohann Henselの娘として生まれた。約1668年にMaximilian Kihmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1685年6月12日に故郷で37歳で死去し，ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステルラウトズキルチェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL(은)는 대략 1649년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 블리스카스텔 알슈바치에서 Johann Hensel의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1668년 Maximilian Kihm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1685년 6월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 블리스카스텔 로츠커천에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL nasceu aproximadamente 1649, em Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha filha de Johann Hensel. Ela casou-se com Maximilian Kihm aproximadamente 1668. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de junho de 1685, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL родилась около 1649 г. в местности алщбач, блиескастел, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. Её отца звали Johann Hensel. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maximilian Kihm около 1668 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 июня 1685 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности лауцкирчэн, блиескастел, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Gertrud HENSEL nació aproximadamente 1649, en Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania como hija de Johann Hensel. Se casó con Maximilian Kihm aproximadamente 1668. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1685, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Lautzkirchen, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania.
